text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense a discomfort hanging in the air between
Trainer Kiryuin and Happy Meek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a fellow trainer aiming for the same crown, I
can't just sit and watch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I help them to reconcile, I get the sense that
I'm witnessing the growth of my own rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of gratitude, Trainer Kiryuin gives me the
Trainer's Handbook, a treatise containing the
ultimate secrets of Umamusume training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the secret knowledge contained in the
Kiryuin family's Trainer Handbook,
<chrname> improves by leaps and
bounds!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I help them to reconcile, I get the sense that
I'm witnessing the growth of my own rival.
